name: Calibrated e-CUSUM Decoding for Quantized Reasoning Models: Why Token Log-Probability Is the Wrong Observable for Decoding Monitors
summary: arXiv:2607.11317v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Low-bit quantization makes small reasoning models inexpensive to deploy but can degrade their chains of thought. This motivates decoder-side monitors...
description: arXiv:2607.11317v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Low-bit quantization makes small reasoning models inexpensive to deploy but can degrade their chains of thought. This motivates decoder-side monitors that intervene when generation becomes unreliable. We show that a natural candidate, the centered token log-probability increment $\log p(w_t)+H_t$, is the wrong observable for this purpose. Under th...
author: El Hassane Ettifouri (Novelis Research, Paris, France), Ayoub Belfatmi (Novelis Research, Paris, France), Mahaman Sanoussi Yahaya Alassan (Novelis Research, Paris, France), Walid Dahhane (Novelis Research, Paris, France)
